member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler
member.summary: Handles sending memory profiling data to level 4 ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.TsattrValueSeparator
member.summary: Separator for tsattr values.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.GetOrderedItuffData(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets ordered ituff data for lotStartDatalogTM.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.IsItuffMemoryProfilingDisabled
member.summary: Finds out if memory ituff memory profiling is disabled via _UserVars.DISABLE_MEMORY_STATISTICS_ITUFF uservar.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.RegisterPostInitMemoryFlowEvent(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Enables Post init flow event = StoreCurrentMemoryParameters. Refer to callback documentation for more details.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.SetOverallVerifyInstancesMemoryProfile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets overall verify instances memory profile for ituff. Used by InitializeInstances TM TestInstanceStatistics.cs.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.SetTopInstancesMemoryProfile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets top instances memory profile data.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.SetPerClassMemoryProfile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets per class memory profile data.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.SetPerServiceMemoryProfile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets per service memory profile data.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.SetOverallServicesMemoryProfile(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Sets overall memory profile for services data.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.SetInitStartMemoryParams(System.Int64,System.Int64,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stores the init memory params. Meant to be used by InitializeLibrary TM to store start init memory params.
member.param: Private memory at start of init flow.
Virtual memory at start of init flow.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.MemoryProfilerItuffHandler.GetInitFlowMemoryParamsString(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets init flow memory params string.
member.returns: String with init flow memory statistics.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler
member.summary: Helper class for profiling memory use on the machine this instance of Prime is running on.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.KeyForTestMethodList
member.summary: Key used to get list of keys in shared storage. Shouldn't be used by user of this class. Methods within this namespace should abstract having to access this in SS.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.#ctor(Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod
member.summary: The test method that is using this API.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod.INITIALIZEINSTANCESMEMORYUSE
member.summary: InitializeInstancesTM is using this API.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod.INITIALIZELIBRARYMEMORYUSE
member.summary: InitializeLibraryTM is using this API.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod.INITIALIZESERVICESMEMORYUSE
member.summary: InitializeServicesTM is using this API.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod.LOTSTARTSETUPMEMORYUSE
member.summary: LotStartSetupTM is using this API.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod.DEVICESTARTSETUPMEMORYUSAGE
member.summary: DeviceStartSetupTM is using this API.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.MemoryInUseByProcess
member.summary: Gets amount of memory in use by the current process running Prime.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TotalPhysicalMemory
member.summary: Gets total amount of physical memory of machine in Bytes.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.IsInstanceExceedingMemory
member.summary: Perform a check to see if the instance using PRIME is exceeding physical memory.
member.returns: Whether the instance is exceeding memory or not.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.GetQueriedTestMethods(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets a list of keys of all the submissions of memory profiling.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.RecordMemoryUseByProcess(Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Submit the current memory use by process utilizing the PRIME library to . This data is retrieved later by evoking .
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.RecordMemoryUseAndThrowIfExceedingMaxMemory(Prime.BusinessLogic.MemoryProfiler.Profiler.TestMethod,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This method will record instance memory use, but throws if exceeding physical memory of machine.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.remarks: Main purpose is to not allow TPs that will be slow due to OS paging, severely impacting test time and potentially crashing the tester.

members.member:
Retrieve profiled values from each test methods that evoked
before evoking this method.
The test method that evoked . . The session context of this operation. Memory usage profiled for when the given test method evoked .
